taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Java Developer
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electrical or Computer Engineering, or a related field, 2+ years of prior work experience preferred, Experience of software development skills in a modern object-oriented programming language ideally Java / Go, Python considered a plus, Experience with an RDBMS or SQL, Ability to learn new languages and technologies quickly, Excellent problem-solving skills with high attention to detail, Effective communication skills, Adaptability: while you enjoy establishing process and standards, you understand the need to be flexible and enjoy trying new things
preferred_quals: Previous knowledge in financial markets isn't required, but interest is a plus
core_responsibilities: Working with a variety of languages/frameworks, such as Java, Go, Python and technologies such as RDBMS, Kubernetes, and Docker, Google Cloud Platform, Designing, developing, testing, deploying, maintaining and improving software, Building resilient, self-scaling, self-healing services that allow you to sleep through the night, Writing high-quality, well-tested code, Maintaining high code-quality standards across your team via code reviews, Attending training and expand domain knowledge on Accounts creation and Maintenance, Encouraging innovation by questioning business processes throughout the company
job_summary: Apex Fintech Solutions is a company that powers innovation in digital wealth management by processing millions of transactions daily. They are seeking a Software Engineer I to work closely with software development and business teams to build products and services for their financial back office solutions.
